summary: Full regression for SM Paint Industries 20-product catalogue + rebrand. Backend: 14/14 pytest cases PASS (100%) — site/config new fields (1983, Chandni Chowk, smpaints2001 email, +91 76691 53715, whatsapp 917669153715, vespa_logo_url, galleria_logo_url), 20 products (vespa=8/galleria=5/general=7), emulsion category, featured>=3, full tech fields on detail, 116 colors across 4 collections, inquiry POST, admin login + admin CRUD with general-line product. Frontend: Home shows real email & phone, 40+/3/116/20 stat tiles, real Vespa & Galleria brand logo images (98kradn4, czd1adua) on both Home and Brands pages. Brands page lists all 8 Vespa + 5 Galleria product names and 4 sister brands (Batra, Bawa, Silver Coin, Gold Coin). /products has 20 products by default, 4 line filters (all/vespa/galleria/general), filter-line-general yields 7, emulsion category filter present. Product detail shows full tech grid (Finish/Coverage/Drying/Recoat/Application/Thinner/Primer/Shades/Pack Sizes) with VESPA line pill. WhatsApp FAB opens https://wa.me/917669153715. Footer has mailto:smpaints2001@gmail.com, tel:+917669153715, 'Chandni Chowk, New Delhi'. ISSUE FOUND: Several hardcoded '1982' strings remain in frontend (should be 1983).

ui_bugs.component: PublicLayout top strip + footer + Home hero
ui_bugs.issue: Hardcoded '1982' strings remain — top strip shows both 'SINCE 1983' (from config) AND a fallback line 'CONFIDENCE OF QUALITY · DURABILITY · SINCE 1982'. Footer shows 'INDUSTRIAL COATINGS · EST. 1982'. Home hero overline shows 'EST. 1982' and 'Since 1982' card. Should all be 1983.

action_items: Replace all hardcoded '1982' with '1983' in /app/frontend/src/components/PublicLayout.jsx (line 19 tagline fallback, line 101 'Est. 1982', line 129 'SINCE 1982') and /app/frontend/src/pages/Home.jsx (line 31 'Est. 1982', line 73 'Since 1982'). Preferably read established/tagline from site/config instead of hardcoding.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 930 lines — should be split (routes/models/seeds) for maintainability
Frontend duplicates the date string in multiple hardcoded places (1982) — single source of truth should come from /api/site/config (established, tagline) which already returns 1983 correctly
Tagline fallback in PublicLayout.jsx useState still says 'Since 1982' — even if config fetch fails it should match brand identity
CORS allow_origins='*' with allow_credentials=True is non-compliant (acceptable for preview env only)
Admin password fallback hardcoded — should fail-fast if ADMIN_PASSWORD env missing in production

success_rate.frontend: ~95% — all functional flows pass, only hardcoded year strings wrong

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed product/inquiry created and cleaned up via admin CRUD endpoints during pytest run
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend endpoints + frontend flows verified working post-rebrand. 14 pytest cases at /app/backend/tests/test_sm_paints.py cover all new requirements. Only outstanding issue is cosmetic: 5 hardcoded '1982' literals across PublicLayout.jsx and Home.jsx that should be '1983' (site/config endpoint already returns established='1983' correctly). Main agent can search-replace and self-verify.
rca_of_the_issue: During the rebrand/year-update pass, /app/backend/.env COMPANY_ESTABLISHED was set to 1983 and /api/site/config returns 1983 — but the frontend never finished the migration: useState initial value in PublicLayout.jsx still hardcodes 'Since 1982' (used until async config fetch resolves AND in places where cfg.tagline isn't bound), and Home.jsx + PublicLayout footer/top-strip lines render literal 'Est. 1982 / SINCE 1982' strings instead of reading from cfg.established. Reproduce: load any page and inspect top-strip secondary line and footer microcopy. Fix: globally replace 1982 with 1983 in the 5 lines listed in action_items, or bind to {cfg.established} / {cfg.tagline}.
